title: Levasha's Origins
description: An origins pack that includes a few new origins to play with.
body:
Do you have a few origins that you want to use, that other mods don't have?

Here's two origins that I've never seen anywhere else (even with a bit of digging) and one that ties into minecraft. More will come soon.

This requires [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) to be played, as usual. Apoli and Apugli can be added if you want.

## Leviathan (3 Impact)
Leviathan is meant to be a reference to whale leviathans in games, or ones seen as similar to dragons, but generally, It's a size 2 fish.
### Leviathan's Might
- +5 Hearts of Health
- 1.2x Buff to all Damage
- Buffs you while in rain or underwater.
- Breaks stuff at 1.25x the speed
- Gains different buffs via getting struck by lightning.
- Sees perfectly underwater
- Sees perfectly in the night.
- Gets hungry at 1.75x speed.
### Abyssal Diet
- Buffs dried kelp and all non-modded fish to feed the player a lot more.
- You can eat Dried Kelp Blocks in order to fulfill hunger and gain saturation temporarily. It also makes you burp very loud.
- I tried to make you unable to eat certain foods, but gave up, because it doesnt help that doing this makes Platinum Bass and Catfish unable to be eaten. (Yes, they're both from mods.)
### Stormcaller
- Press Primary Ability to start a thunderstorm.
- Punch with nothing in your hand to fire a trident.
### Hydrated Body
- Triples fire damage.
### Aqua Affinity
- Literally just base origins' Aqua Affinity from Merfolk.

## Behemoth (3 Impact)
Behemoth is on the opposite side of Leviathan, think of it as like a sibling rivalry. Basically, a Bull vs a Shark. This isn't fully finished, but as soon as I get to it, it'll be finished up.
### Lord of the Grove
- +5 Hearts of Health
- Gain buffs while in wooded or grassland biomes.
- Triples fire damage.
- Gets hungry at 1.75x speed.
### Overharvest
- Bonemeals saplings or farmland.
### Vegetarian
- Vegetarian from Avian.
### Fall Immunity
- Fall immunity from Feline.
### Strong Arms
- Just the base origins' Strong Arms from Shulk, allows punching stone and not breaking your hand.

## Bomber (2 Impact)
This sorta references the Festive Creeper from Primeval Mobs, but there'll be more coming, I don't think it's quite fully finished yet.
### Nitroglycerin
- Throws an explosive ball as long as you're holding nothing in either hand, but if you're holding TNT, Fireballs or Gunpowder, the explosion becomes a lot stronger.
### Explosion Immunity
- Full immunity to explosions and fire damage. Does it make you immune to lava, Not too sure, haven't tested it yet.
### Nine Lives
- The same as the one from the Feline.
### No Shield
- Can't use a shield, same as the Shulk.

## Funguspawn (2 Impact)
There's a lot of references in it, but I was mainly going for a mushroom-themed dummy that could only eat mushrooms.
### Fungal Diet
- Literally can only eat mushrooms and fungi, including mushroom stew. (ok fine you can drink sus stew)
### Mushfarmer
- You spawn with 10 mushrooms of each kind, and you get more mushrooms from breaking mushroom blocks. This does not apply to Fungi.
### Fungal Growth
- YOU CAN'T WEAR NON-MODDED METALLIC ARMOR!!!
